archetype: Swiss & High-Contrast (Archetype 4) mixed with Editorial Documentary
instructions_to_main_agent: Design a highly crafted, editorial-style UI using React, HTML, and Tailwind CSS. The user is a novice running this on GitHub Pages.
IMPORTANT: Output `.js` files (NOT `.tsx`) since the user has a pure JavaScript React setup.
Do NOT use a generic startup dashboard aesthetic. Emulate premium print editorial design (e.g., Pentagram, The Pudding, NYT Opinion).
Rely heavily on typography hierarchy, sharp edges, pure CSS bento grids, and high-contrast element separation instead of soft shadows or heavy glassmorphism.

CRITICAL: All interactive and key informational elements (buttons, links, form inputs, menus, error messages, toggles) MUST include a descriptive, role-based `data-testid` attribute (e.g., `data-testid="select-geography-vidarbha"`).
Ensure photo placeholder slots feel deliberately designed. If an image is missing, style the slot with a 1px border, a subtle background, and elegant monospace typography (e.g., 'IMG. 01').

rules.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl lg:text-7xl font-serif tracking-tight leading-none text-[#0a1629]
rules.numbers: Use tabular-nums and IBM Plex Mono for all data points, metrics, and dates.

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Use generous padding: p-6, p-8, p-12. Give elements breathing room to evoke high-end editorial design.
layout_and_spacing.borders_and_surfaces: Use sharp, 1px solid borders (`border-black/10` or `border-[#2bb6b7]`) to create structural divisions like newspaper columns. Avoid soft box-shadows. Use `shadow-none`.
layout_and_spacing.corners: Sharp (`rounded-none`) or extremely subtle (`rounded-sm`) to maintain editorial gravitas.

entry.layout: Large typographic hero section alongside a bento grid for the 3-step onboarding (Hazard, Role, Geography).
entry.interactions: Hover states on geography cards should reveal subtle Publishing Aqua borders.

solutions.components: Cards should have an image slot on top, tight typography below. Ensure 'first-step' CTA is prominent in Consulting Blue.
solutions.indicators: Evidence levels must use mono font inside crisp border pills. High = Green (#2ecc71), Med = PA Yellow (#ffa600).

providers.components: Dense, highly legible list layout. Responsiveness stars must use PA Yellow. Connect buttons (Phone/Email) aligned right.

schemes.components: Use horizontal progress/rating bars colored with Publishing Aqua for accessibility metrics. Prominently style warnings with Red or PA Yellow left-borders.

my_pathway.components: Use a stark vertical timeline line on the left (`border-l-2 border-black/10`). Entries bulleted with Mono font timestamps. Ensure styling is high-contrast for physical printing.

dashboard.components: Background: Deep blue/black. Use vibrant accents (PA Yellow, Pink, Publishing Aqua) against dark surfaces for charts, heatmaps, and unmet need signals.

components.buttons: Flat, zero shadow. Primary: `bg-[#2161c2] text-white hover:bg-blue-800`. Secondary: `border border-[#2161c2] text-[#2161c2] hover:bg-[#f3f3f3]`.
components.icons: Use lucide-react. Keep stroke width thin (1.5 or 1.25) to align with the elegant editorial feel.
components.tags: Style as document tags: `bg-white border border-gray-300 text-xs font-mono uppercase px-2 py-1`.

media.instructions: Use these authentic documentary-style images to replace standard UI placeholders to achieve the 'National Geographic' quality requested.

image_urls.description: South Asian farmer with oxen in Nagpur, Maharashtra - Use for Vidarbha geography card.
Vibrant fishing village along the Odisha coastline - Use for Odisha geography card.
Breathtaking mountains of Ladakh - Use for Ladakh geography card.
Portrait of a man - Use for community stories or provider avatars.
Portrait of a woman - Use for community stories or provider avatars.
